title: Drymochloa drymeja
taxonomy: Drymochloa drymeja is a species of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. More specifically, it is classified within the tribe Andropogoneae. This classification places it among the grasses, with the exact classification being Drymochloa drymeja, within the genus Drymochloa. The genus Drymochloa itself is part of the larger family Poaceae. Further classification could potentially place it within the subfamily Panicoideae.
uses: Drymochloa drymeja is known for its traditional uses in medicine.  The plant has been used in various cultures to treat various health conditions. Its leaves and roots have been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Additionally, it has been used to treat wounds and skin conditions. However, the effectiveness and safety of these uses have not been extensively scientifically proven.
